ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the job is posted */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job category */,
  "position" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary offered for the position */,
  "salary_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "salary_period" TEXT /* Period of the salary (e.g., per year, per month, etc.) */,
  "experience_required" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the position */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level required for the position (junior, mid-level, senior, etc.) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Minimum education level required for the position */,
  "resume_required" INTEGER /* Whether a resume is required for the application */,
  "cover_letter_required" INTEGER /* Whether a cover letter is required for the application */,
  "application_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the application process */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags related to the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (full-time, part-time, internship, etc.) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the job belongs to */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "nice_to_have_skills" TEXT /* Nice-to-have skills for the job */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the job listing */,
  "applicant_count" INTEGER /* Number of applicants for the job listing */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the job listing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the job listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the job listing was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date the job listing was deleted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, recruiter, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the user applied for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied for the job */,
  "user_profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's profile */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the user applied for the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., job board, referral, etc.) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the application process */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback about the application process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_profile_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "current_position" TEXT /* Current job position of the user */,
  "current_company" TEXT /* Current company of the user */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the user */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills possessed by the user */,
  "resume_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the user's resume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job view */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the job */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the user viewed the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_views_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the job location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the job is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the job is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
